untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration testing (ADF p-value), price spread calculation relative to historical mean, and standard deviation thresholds. These are statistical measures requiring pair analysis and historical rolling statistics not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators do not include cointegration metrics, spread calculations, or mean-reversion pair trading constructs necessary to properly implement this pairs trading strategy.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading (long-short) mean reversion signal that requires: (1) cointegration testing between two equities, (2) calculation of price spreads relative to historical means, (3) standard deviation thresholds on spreads. None of these pair-level statistical measures can be expressed using only single-asset price indicators. A proper implementation would require custom indicators for spread, cointegration, and rolling statistics.
